title: The Shock
diagnosis: The actual opener has a strong ChatGPT text-box hook, but status/source notes appear before the story and the current close ends in task bullets rather than emotional propulsion.
surgical_upgrade: Move status/source notes below a visible chapter-start marker and rewrite the last page as a clean handoff from public shock to the older history of prediction.

title: Before the Transformer
diagnosis: The mechanism chain is strong and the closing handoff works, but the opener is still framed as project metadata before story.
surgical_upgrade: Start with the felt bottleneck of early language modeling, then move source caveats into a note after the first scene/question.

title: Attention Catches Fire
diagnosis: The chapter has technical awe and a good scale handoff, but the first visible material is again status/source caution rather than rupture.
surgical_upgrade: Open on recurrence breaking under long context and GPUs waiting for parallelism before naming the Transformer paper.

title: The Scaling Bet
diagnosis: The closing wager is compelling, but the opener needs a clearer human/institutional bet rather than metadata plus abstract curves.
surgical_upgrade: Begin with labs deciding that loss curves could be strategy, then make compute-as-possibility the chapter question.

title: GPT-1 to GPT-3: The Door Opens
diagnosis: The lineage is substantial, but the opening is source/visual apparatus and the close is a to-do list.
surgical_upgrade: Replace the current visible opening with GPT-3/API as the moment a paper lineage became a door others could knock on; convert closing bullets into a Microsoft/ChatGPT handoff paragraph.

title: Alignment Enters the Product
diagnosis: The chapter topic has high stakes, but front matter and closing task bullets drain narrative voltage.
surgical_upgrade: Open with the gap between a completion engine and an assistant that must refuse, obey, and explain; end by handing directly to ChatGPT as the interface test.

title: ChatGPT: The Interface Event
diagnosis: The Box frame works, but status/source notes delay it and the chapter ends in production tasks.
surgical_upgrade: Cut to "The Box" immediately and replace final bullets with a platform-expansion close into Microsoft/OpenAI.

title: Microsoft, OpenAI, and the Cloud Bargain
diagnosis: This is one of the strongest narrative chapters: the workload sentence is clean, stakes are clear, and the close has genuine force.
surgical_upgrade: Add one concrete Azure/buildout scene or sourced public moment near the opener to make the cloud bargain feel less abstract without adding outcome claims.

title: Google and DeepMind Wake the Sleeping Giant
diagnosis: The opener gives character, irony, and institutional stakes; the close lands on a memorable image.
surgical_upgrade: Sharpen the central question into a repeated refrain: which part of the giant moves first?

title: Meta, Llama, and the Open-Weight Shock
diagnosis: The closing argument is strong, but source/visual notes appear before the dramatic open-weight shock.
surgical_upgrade: Start on the downloadable-object moment and move source caveats below the first narrative beat.

title: The Chinese Frontier
diagnosis: The chapter has disciplined scope and a strong map-widening close, but risks reading like an evidence ledger.
surgical_upgrade: Open with one supported model-family contrast, then immediately state why shortcuts fail in this frontier.

title: Europe, xAI, and the Rest of the Frontier
diagnosis: The close is excellent and the aperture-widening role is clear; the chapter still carries structural conflict with Anthropic.
surgical_upgrade: Resolve the Chapter 12 identity conflict before polishing, then make the opener pose plurality as a problem rather than a survey.

title: Benchmarks, Arenas, and the Mirage of Rank
diagnosis: The Desire For A Crown is a strong conceptual hook, but the chapter still has appendix energy.
surgical_upgrade: Add a short scene of a reader/operator staring at a leaderboard before the methodology apparatus begins.

title: NVIDIA and CUDA: The Moat Under the Moat
diagnosis: The title and mechanism are good, but the opening is front matter and the close is future-work bullets.
surgical_upgrade: Open on the invisible CUDA layer under an LLM demo; close with a clean handoff to GTC 2026 stagecraft.

title: GTC 2026: The AI Factory Sells Itself
diagnosis: The stagecraft-to-loading-dock close is very strong; source apparatus still precedes the live show.
surgical_upgrade: Move source/visual sequence notes below the first keynote-stage scene so the reader enters the room before the caveats.

title: Datacenters, Power, and the Physical Internet
diagnosis: This is the benchmark chapter for narrative pull: substation, bottleneck, and industrial contradiction all land cleanly.
surgical_upgrade: Use Chapter 16 as the house style for future physical chapters: plain image, then mechanism, then constraint.

title: Data, Tokens, and the Library Problem
diagnosis: The subject has strong supply-chain potential, but metadata opens the chapter and closing bullets stop momentum.
surgical_upgrade: Open with a token entering the library/filtering machine and close by handing from data supply to tools/retrieval.

title: Tools, Retrieval, and the Agent Turn
diagnosis: The Text Box Grows Hands is a good hook, but the chapter closes in reconciliation tasks.
surgical_upgrade: Keep the title as opener, add one concrete tool-boundary example, and end with code as the first domain where hands became measurable.

title: Code as the Second Native Language
diagnosis: The Language That Compiles works, but source notes and closing tasks blunt the chapter's personal stakes for builders.
surgical_upgrade: Open with intent becoming executable syntax under test feedback; end with why Claude Code deserves a case-study chapter.

title: Claude Code and the Industrialization of Pair Programming
diagnosis: The Terminal Becomes A Colleague has strong interface drama, but the close remains a workplan.
surgical_upgrade: Close on permissioned repository work as an industrial form of pair programming, not a list of future source tasks.

title: Reasoning, Test-Time Compute, and the New Scaling Axis
diagnosis: The opening sentence relocates compute beautifully, but the ending is a blocker list.
surgical_upgrade: Keep the opener; turn the close into the cost/latency handoff to economics while preserving inference-contract caveats.

title: The Economics of Intelligence on Tap
diagnosis: The Meter Appears is clean, but the chapter needs more business drama and a non-bullet close.
surgical_upgrade: Open with a token meter running under a chat box; close by asking what happens when cheap fluency still cannot be trusted.

title: Failure Modes, Truth, and Trust
diagnosis: The opener is vivid and serious; the ending falls back into source-control bullets.
surgical_upgrade: End with the reader carrying suspicion into the final chapter: fluency was useful because it was dangerous, not despite danger.

title: Next Token
diagnosis: The opening motif is strong and truthful, but the visible ending currently includes task bullets after the prose.
surgical_upgrade: Polish the last page so the human-judgment ending is the final visible note, with source/blocker notes moved out of the emotional close.
